caption:
📚 The Lecture That Never Ended 📚

I told them I'd finish the lecture before midnight, but the spark between me and my star student was impossible to ignore. I adjusted the tie of my fitted blazer, feeling the fabric cling to every curve, my cream silk blouse hugging my chest. The library was quiet, save for the hum of the server, and I leaned in close to whisper the final solution. His eyes never left mine, and I could feel the heat of his gaze on the fabric covering my figure. It wasn't just about grades anymore; it was about us. The blazer slid slightly off my shoulder, revealing the lace underneath, a secret between us in the dim light.

#UniversityTeacher #ProfessorLife #SexyAcademics #LateNightStudy #ItalianVibes 🇮🇹
